description: Recto: Letter or essay regarding the proper authorities to consult when learning the art of ophthalmology; the author of this fragment seems to be a partisan of using ʿAlī b. ʿĪsā's handbook Tadhkirat al-Kaḥḥālīn, and "the big books" must only be consulted from time to time. Verso: Pen trials in Hebrew script.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
